mano_cua.result_summary: Facebook分享按钮功能正常：点击后成功跳转到facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=http://localhost:3000/，URL格式正确（符合标准sharer.php?u=格式），Facebook页面正常加载显示登录界面。未发现功能或视觉异常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Facebook share button works correctly. Clicking opens new tab to facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=http://localhost:3000/ which is the correct standard sharing URL format. Facebook page loads normally showing login screen (expected since user is not logged in).
